overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired character (Ciri from The Witcher 3) walking through a snowy winter landscape. The character traverses a rural trail, crosses a wooden bridge over a frozen stream, and approaches a large ruined stone archway under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered rural trail through open fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snow-covered dirt path through open fields toward a distant figure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the trail

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered ground with patches of frozen grass
bare winter trees scattered across the landscape
snow-dusted dirt path winding through the fields
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered dirt trail through open winter fields. Leafless trees dot the landscape and distant mountains are visible under an overcast sky. A distant NPC walks ahead on the same path.

events.description: character steps onto wooden bridge crossing a frozen stream
character exits bridge back onto snow-covered trail

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge over frozen water and continuing along the path

notable_agents.action: distant figure continuing ahead across the bridge

entered.detail: weathered wooden bridge with railings spanning a frozen waterway
ice-covered water visible beside and under the bridge
wooden fence railings along the bridge sides

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over a frozen stream, with wooden railings on either side. The bridge surface is partially covered in snow. After crossing, the character returns to the dirt trail with stone ruins becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with ancient stone ruins and markers

events.description: stone ruins and markers become prominent along both sides of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking past ancient stone ruins and markers while approaching a large stone archway

notable_agents.action: figure approaching the stone archway ahead

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone walls and pillars alongside the path
weathered stone posts and monuments flanking the trail
massive ruined stone archway with stairs visible in the distance
stone tower structure visible beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the trail past ancient stone ruins and markers that line both sides of the path. A massive stone archway with stairs becomes increasingly prominent ahead, with a tower visible in the distance beyond it.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone archway entrance with stairs

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs through the large ruined archway

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps through the moss-covered archway toward figures waiting at the top

notable_agents.action: two figures standing at the top of the stairs beyond the arch

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward through the archway
ancient stone walls covered in green moss and vines

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone stairs through the massive ruined archway, passing moss-covered walls. The ground transitions from snow-covered dirt to stone steps. Two figures are visible waiting at the top of the stairs beyond the arch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate winter wilderness that gradually leads toward the imposing entrance of an ancient ruin. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered dirt trail through open fields dotted with leafless trees and distant mountains under an overcast sky. As the path progresses, the camera follows the character across a snow-dusted wooden bridge over a frozen stream before returning to the trail where stone ruins emerge in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character passes ancient markers and ruins lining the path, with a massive stone archway and a distant tower becoming increasingly prominent. Finally, the ground transitions from snow-covered dirt to stone steps as the character ascends through the mossy archway toward two figures waiting at the top.
